things.name: Real Alcazar
things.description: UNESCO-listed Royal Palace complex of stunning Mudéjar architecture and gardens

things.name: Seville Cathedral & Giralda
things.description: World's largest Gothic cathedral with La Giralda tower and Columbus's tomb

things.name: Barrio Santa Cruz
things.description: Enchanting former Jewish quarter of whitewashed houses and orange blossom lanes

things.name: Plaza de Espana
things.description: Spectacular 1929 semicircular palace complex with canal, bridges and tile mosaics

things.name: Metropol Parasol
things.description: World's largest wooden structure with rooftop walkway over the Encarnacion square

things.name: Torre del Oro
things.description: 13th-century golden tower on the Guadalquivir with a maritime museum inside

things.name: Flamenco Shows
things.description: Authentic flamenco performances in traditional tablaos in the city that invented the art

things.name: Maria Luisa Park
things.description: Romantic 19th-century park with fountains, peacocks and the Archaeological Museum

things.name: Triana District
things.description: Traditional potters' and flamenco neighbourhood across the river with tapas bars

things.name: Italica Roman Ruins
things.description: Birthplace of emperors Trajan and Hadrian with a stunning amphitheatre 9km away
